title: Fig. 3 in Some Unusual Small-Subunit Ribosomal RNA Sequences of Metazoans
author: GIRIBET, GONZALO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. Phylogenetic tree based on 18S rRNA sequence data indicating the position of two symphylans (box) with respect to other myriapods (underlined taxa) in a phylogenetic analysis of arthropods (from Giribet, 1997). The two symphylans appear related to other myriapods.
steps_raw: Fig. 3. Phylogenetic tree based on 18S rRNA sequence data indicating the position of two symphylans (box) with respect to other myriapods (underlined taxa) in a phylogenetic analysis of arthropods (from Giribet, 1997). The two symphylans appear related to other myriapods.
